3017200.name: VOXEL Hunters Demo
3017200.description:
The Cosmos Needs Hunters. Are You Up for the Challenge?

An alien scourge ravages the cosmos. You are a HUNTER, the galaxy’s elite defense. Deploy in this top-down roguelite arena shooter and take the fight to the enemy.

Enter small, fast-paced arenas where you must eliminate all enemies. Engage in quick, action-packed missions, experiment with powerful abilities and augments, and unlock unique cosmetics to customize your appearance.

The system’s last hope rests on your trigger finger. Will you rise to the challenge?
